title: Persona size budget must gate IN-LANE when agents/*.md change — not redden main post-ship
notes: THIRD instance of the per-cycle-gate ≠ repo-wide-gate class (warnship-apicover-ci-gap lineage): TestPersonaStopCriterionDedupe_CombinedLineCountReduced pins a 751-line combined budget on agents/evolve-{scout,builder,auditor}.md, but agents/*.md is not a Go package, so a lane growing a persona doc passes its diff-scoped ACS and reddens main's go workflow post-ship (2026-07-23: slice-B additions did it, then cycle-107x removal-claims did it again same day; both fixed console-first by compression). Fix the CLASS: when the cycle diff touches agents/evolve-*.md, run the internal/prompts package tests as part of the build floor (DefaultBuildFloorChecks entry keyed on changed paths → evolve selfcheck build inherits it), so the builder sees the budget breach in-session and compresses before handoff.
